Text:
47 ciders and perries are coming to the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026, and it is one of the strongest Cider Bar line-ups we have put together.

This year we have gone big on flavoured ciders, reflecting just how popular they have become. Alongside them you will find Eastern Counties, West Country and Farmhouse styles, four keeved ciders, and five perries for those who prefer something a little different. Two sparkling ciders join the bar as well, this time from Ross on Wye and Pilton. Many of the producers are new to the festival, so there is plenty to discover even if you have been before.

Advance tickets are on sale now:
https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Perry #BritishCider #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
